description:
Relocate the first bus stop defined in pasubio_bus_stops.add.xml in the Bologna Pasubio scenario (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/) to the next downstream edge on its route as specified in pasubio_busses.rou.xml. For the relocated stop, set startPos="5" and endPos="25" on the first lane of the new edge. Analyze the impact on bus travel times by comparing a baseline simulation with the modified version. Save the baseline output to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/baseline_tripinfos.xml and the modified output to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/modified_tripinfos.xml. Calculate the average trip duration in seconds for all bus trips (trips with 'bus' in the ID or vType) for both simulations. Create a summary report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/bus_stop_relocation_report.txt using the following format:
original_edge: <edge_id>
new_edge: <edge_id>
baseline_avg_duration: <value>
modified_avg_duration: <value>
